arts.ttl: Bayern boss provides injury update on Harry Kane ahead of Celtic clash
arts.sum: Harry Kane missed Bayern Munich training ahead of Tuesday's Champions League second leg play-off with Celtic due to a facial injury.

Bayern Munich saw a five-game winning run end in a 0-0 draw at Bayer Leverkusen on Saturday, a match in which they were fortunate to claim a result. They have won seven on the spin on home turf as the...

arts.ttl: Kane sits out Bayern training before Celtic match
arts.sum: Harry Kane misses training with Bayern Munich before Tuesday's Champions League play-off second leg against Celtic, but head coach Vincent Kompany says the striker's facial injury is "nothing too bad".

arts.ttl: 'Anything is possible' - Musiala is hoping for a reunion with 'big character' Kuhn
arts.sum: Bayern Munich's Musiala has expressed his joy at former teammate Nicolas Kuhn’s progress for Celtic

arts.ttl: Harry Kane in major Celtic fitness mystery as Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany declares 'I threw up a smoke bomb'
arts.sum: The England captain suffered a facial knock at the weekend and his boss has refused to rule him in or out of the Hoops clash.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich Max Eberl to make sales pitch to three players in effort to convince them to leave
arts.sum: According to a report from Sport Bild journalists Christian Falk and Tobi Altschäffl (as captured by @MiaSanMia ), Bayern Munich board member for sport Max Eberl will meet with Leon Goretzka, Serge Gnabry, and Kingsley Coman in an attempt to convince them to leave the club this summer. Max Eberl will try to convince Leon Goretzka, Kingsley Coman and Serge Gnabry of a summer move.

arts.ttl: Jamal Musiala names Celtic star Bayern Munich fear most as wunderkid tips him to make a massive career step
arts.sum: The pair came through the ranks together at Bayern and Musiala thinks his old mate can get to the very top

arts.ttl: Roy Keane tells Gary Neville if he still supports Manchester United and Celtic
arts.sum: Roy Keane on his support for Celtic, Manchester United and Nottingham Forest When Gary Neville asked him that question, Keane made the point as clear as possible ‘I wouldn’t say I am a fan’ and how he ‘doesn’t lose sleep’ over Manchester United, Celtic or Forest going through troubles.

arts.ttl: Kompany provides update on Harry Kane injury concern
arts.sum: Bayern Munich's head coach, Vincent Kompany, provided a fresh update on marksman Harry Kane in this afternoon's press conference. The Englishman was not spotted in team training earlier today.

arts.ttl: "It won't be an easy game" - Musiala looks ahead to Celtic clash
arts.sum: Jamal Musiala reflected on last weekend's top-spiel clash with Bayer Leverkusen and shared his thoughts ahead of Tuesday night's UCL second-leg tie with Celtic.
